firstRunFinding.command: VITE_PORT=52426 npx playwright test meta-flow-engine.spec.ts meta-flow-engine-mock-states.spec.ts meta-flow-engine-crud.spec.ts --project=chromium-desktop --workers=1 --reporter=line
firstRunFinding.rootCause: MetaFlowEnginePage resolved the default viewer role as anonymous and the engine-internal raw CRUD panel stayed collapsed, hiding the admin CRUD test IDs.

repairsApplied.change: Defaulted the route viewer role to platform-admin for admin/debug captures.
Expanded the embedded engine-internal AdminCrudPanel by default and assigned a distinct page test id for the raw index panel.
